targets.expr: label_replace(gta_rp_notion_import_latest_entries_total{status="new"}, "libelle", "Nouvelles", "status", ".*") or label_replace(gta_rp_notion_import_latest_entries_total{status="updated"}, "libelle", "Mises a jour", "status", ".*") or label_replace(gta_rp_notion_import_latest_entries_total{status="unchanged"}, "libelle", "Inchangees", "status", ".*") or label_replace(gta_rp_notion_import_latest_entries_total{status="missing"}, "libelle", "Absentes", "status", ".*") or label_replace(gta_rp_notion_import_latest_entries_total{status="failed"}, "libelle", "En erreur", "status", ".*")

label_replace(gta_rp_change_requests_total{status="pending",type="update"}, "libelle", "Modifications en attente", "status", ".*") or label_replace(gta_rp_change_requests_total{status="approved",type="update"}, "libelle", "Modifications acceptees", "status", ".*") or label_replace(gta_rp_change_requests_total{status="rejected",type="update"}, "libelle", "Modifications refusees", "status", ".*") or label_replace(gta_rp_change_requests_total{status="pending",type="create"}, "libelle", "Creations en attente", "status", ".*") or label_replace(gta_rp_change_requests_total{status="approved",type="create"}, "libelle", "Creations acceptees", "status", ".*") or label_replace(gta_rp_change_requests_total{status="rejected",type="create"}, "libelle", "Creations refusees", "status", ".*")
